reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, semitas muy caliente, parecen recién hechas.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the semitas were very hot, they seemed freshly made.

reviews.comment:
Está ubicada en un punto excelente ,lastima que sus bombas son antiguas por lo demás todo bien.

(Translated by Google)
It is located in an excellent spot, it's a shame that its pumps are old, otherwise everything is fine.

reviews.comment:
La verdad muy buena atención el chico nos atendió de primera no tengo nada que reprochar
La recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
The service was excellent; the guy who helped us was fantastic. I have absolutely no complaints. I highly recommend him.

reviews.comment:
Un hallazgo está YPF. Felicitaciones a los muchachos !! que la mantienen pulcra y brillante y atienden de maravilla. Solo hay sanwiches para almorzar. Baños impecables.

(Translated by Google)
YPF is a real find! Congratulations to the staff who keep it spotless and provide excellent service. They only serve sandwiches for lunch. The restrooms are immaculate.

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Pase por la tarde , baños muy limpios de hecho se sentía el olor a lavandina al ingresar, en el servicompras cajera súper amable!

(Translated by Google)
I went in the afternoon, the bathrooms were very clean, in fact you could smell the bleach when you entered, and the cashier at the convenience store was super friendly!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VOdmNtcUs0OTYzWFVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy limpio el baño y con papel, cosa muy difícil de encontrar en muchas estaciones de servicio!! Ideal para ir de cuerpo, pero por favor mantengan la limpieza que tan difícil de encontrar es

(Translated by Google)
The bathroom was very clean and had toilet paper, which is very hard to find at many service stations! Ideal for using the restroom, but please maintain this level of cleanliness, as it's so rare to find.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25jeU4yazVRblpEYTFWbFlWaEhXRmR4VEdoYU1HYxAB

reviews.comment:
Muy amables la gente de la estación en general..

Volvimos despues 3 años y siguen con la amabilidad de siempre y estación completa en servicio.

(Translated by Google)
The staff at the station were very friendly in general.

We returned after three years and they were still as friendly as ever, and the station was fully operational.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/829312115577397471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtaU1tU0JBEAE
